basic_details.job_title: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital has published the Senior Resident (Psychiatry) Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Senior Resident (Psychiatry) positions. Candidates up to 45 years of age and holding an MBBS with a Post Graduate Degree in Psychiatry or a Diploma in Psychological Medicine from a recognized university/institution are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 17 July 2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDF and walkin interview details below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC (Delhi only)

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with Post Graduate Degree in Psychiatry or Diploma in Psychological Medicine from a recognized university/ institution
qualification.details: MBBS with Post Graduate Degree in Psychiatry or Diploma in Psychological Medicine from a recognized university/ institution.

content_sections.heading: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Senior Resident Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Senior Resident (Psychiatry) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Senior Resident Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Senior Resident (Psychiatry) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Senior Residen Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident (Psychiatry) posts at Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital is scheduled for 17th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies announced by Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital?
faq.answer: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Senior Resident (Psychiatry) through this walk-in recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Senior Resident (Psychiatry) post?
faq.answer: The essential qualification for the Senior Resident (Psychiatry) post is MBBS with a Post Graduate Degree in Psychiatry or a Diploma in Psychological Medicine from a recognized university or institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident (Psychiatry) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Resident (Psychiatry) post is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident posts will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Senior Resident (Psychiatry) position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Senior Resident (Psychiatry) position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital located?
faq.answer: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital is located in Delhi, with a pincode of 110052.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: While the notification is for Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital in Delhi, candidates from other states can apply if they meet the eligibility criteria. However, age relaxation for OBC is applicable for Delhi residents only.
